Come in, come in

 Come into my world
 I've got to show, show, show you
 Come into my bed
 I've got to know, know, know you
 I have dreams of orca, whales and owls
 But I wake up in fear (Boom, boom, boom)
 And you will never be my
 You will never be my
 Fool will never be my fool

 Floaters in my eyes
 Wake up in the hotel room
 Cigarettes and lies
 I am a child
 But if too soon
 I have dreams of orca, whales and owls
 But I wake up in fear (Boom, boom, boom)
 And you will never be my
 You will never be my
 Fool will never be my fool

 A little bag of cocaine
 A little bag of cocaine
 So who's the girl wearing the dress?
 I figured out her number
 Wrote us on a paper napkin
 But I don't know her address
 I wait downstairs
 The porter smiles to me
 I smile

 I bought the bag a couple of gold coins
 A sign that I've been caught
 I have dreams of orca, whales and owls
 But I wake up in fear (Boom, boom, boom)
 And you will never be my
 You will never be my
 Dear will never be my dear, dear friend

 Ba- da- da- dum- ba- ba
 Dear, dear friend
 Ba- da- da- dum- ba- ba
 Dear, dear friend
 Ba- da- da- dum- ba- ba
 Dear, dear friend
 Ba- da- da- dum- ba
